mapper.sql: course_code, college_id, course_name, credit, total_hours, create_time, update_time, del_flag
mapper.insert: insert into biz_course(course_code, college_id, course_name, credit, total_hours, description, create_time, update_time, del_flag) values (#{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{credit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

insert into biz_course
course_code,
college_id,
course_name,
credit,
total_hours,
description,
create_time,
update_time,
del_flag,
#{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{credit,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{totalHours,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
mapper.update:
update biz_course
college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
credit = #{credit,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
total_hours = #{totalHours,jdbcType=INTEGER},
description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where course_code = #{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update biz_course set college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, credit = #{credit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_hours = #{totalHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where course_code = #{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update biz_course set college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, course_name = #{courseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, credit = #{credit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, total_hours = #{totalHours,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where course_code = #{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
